issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.next_action: Keep breaker-first truth on /, /execution, /execution/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and current-state docs until release math actually improves.
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 3 勝，還差 12 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: recent canonical 250 rows remains a distribution pathology
issues.next_action: Keep drilling the pathological slice itself instead of diluting the root cause into generic leaderboard or venue discussions.
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=250, alerts=['label_imbalance', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0160, delta_vs_full=-0.6087, dominant_regime=bull(95.20%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0066, avg_quality=-0.2114, avg_dd_penalty=0.2668, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:11/56, frozen:3, compressed:8, expected_static:4, overlay_only:1, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:13, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=16x0 since 2026-04-19 02:56:07.174860 -> 2026-04-19 05:47:02.289562, adverse_streak=191x0 since 2026-04-18 14:33:06.990329 -> 2026-04-19 01:10:17.732530, prev_win_rate=0.048, delta_vs_prev=-0.032, prev_quality=-0.2351, quality_delta_vs_prev=0.0237, prev_pnl=-0.0091, pnl_delta_vs_prev=0.0025, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.0253→0.275,Δσ=2.3313)/feat_4h_bias20(3.1634→0.4287,Δσ=1.6536)/feat_4h_rsi14(70.0955→55.667,Δσ=1.438), new_compressed=feat_atr_pct, frozen_examples=feat_vix(0.0/1)/feat_dxy(0.0075/3)/feat_nq_return_1h(0.0445/3), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/250)/feat_ear(0.0058/248)/feat_tongue(0.0087/250), expected_static_examples=feat_dxy[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_nq_return_1h[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_nq_return_24h[weekend_macro_market_closed], overlay_only_examples=feat_scales_ssr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_vix(1/1435)/feat_dxy(3/3304)/feat_nq_return_1h(3/2864), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-19 05:04:17.295415:0:chop:-0.1551/2026-04-19 05:22:16.132384:0:chop:-0.1649/2026-04-19 05:47:02.289562:0:chop:-0.1687, adverse_examples=2026-04-19 00:40:09.929353:0:bull:-0.2753/2026-04-19 01:01:04.227452:0:bull:-0.3173/2026-04-19 01:10:17.732530:0:bull:-0.2383

issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified

issues.action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing

issues.action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro_plus_all_4h patch must stay visible but reference-only
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; do not promote it from reference-only until current-live exact support reaches the minimum rows.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。
